_meta.description: Feature catalog for Step 5. Pre-built feature options grouped by category.

seed.name: Search + Filter
seed.desc: Find items by keyword, category, price, location

seed.name: Map View
seed.desc: See items or locations on an interactive map

seed.name: Categories / Tags
seed.desc: Organize content into browsable groups

seed.name: Favorites
seed.desc: Save items for later with a heart/star button

seed.name: User Profiles
seed.desc: Name, photo, bio, preferences

seed.name: Reviews + Ratings
seed.desc: Star ratings and written reviews

seed.name: Verification
seed.desc: Badges or checks for trusted users

seed.name: Photo Upload
seed.desc: Users upload images for listings or profiles

seed.name: Book / Schedule
seed.desc: Pick a date/time and reserve a slot

seed.name: Shopping Cart
seed.desc: Add items, review, checkout

seed.name: Payments
seed.desc: Accept money (Stripe, Venmo-style)

seed.name: Order Tracking
seed.desc: Status updates: ordered → shipped → delivered

seed.name: Dashboard KPIs
seed.desc: Big numbers — revenue, users, orders, growth

seed.name: Charts + Graphs
seed.desc: Bar, line, pie charts with real data

seed.name: Activity Feed
seed.desc: Timeline of recent events and actions

seed.name: Notifications
seed.desc: Alerts for new orders, messages, updates

seed.name: Messaging
seed.desc: Chat between users or with support

seed.name: Social Sharing
seed.desc: Share to Instagram, TikTok, Twitter

seed.name: Rewards / Points
seed.desc: Loyalty program, achievements, streaks

seed.name: Settings / Preferences
seed.desc: App config, notification prefs, account
